member.name: M:Canon.Fable.Transpiler.emitValidator(System.String,Canon.Core.Lattice{Canon.Core.Constraint})
member.summary: Emits a full TypeScript validation function for a given named field and predicate.

member.name: T:Canon.Fable.Transpiler
member.summary: Transpiles the Lattice of constraints into TypeScript validation logic.
